strategy: Tiny Balance boss (1,025). Blade and hit; he takes +4% from Myth, Life, and Death.
His only trick: placing a damage trap on him makes him cast a Weakness on you. Skip traps and rely on blades.
One or two blades and a hit finish him.
cheatNotes: Putting a damage trap on him earns you a Weakness. Skip traps here and win with blades and a hit.
